non_blocking_findings.title: Provider C2C check dimensions not enumerated
non_blocking_findings.summary: The plan should explicitly list the hard timeout, idle timeout, stream-json, partial-message, live-startup timeout policy, and isolated-worktree checks that must survive extraction.
non_blocking_findings.resolution: Folded into the P26 plan before implementation by adding a provider C2C parity dimension list.

non_blocking_findings.title: safeRead dependency for C2C module unaddressed
non_blocking_findings.summary: The extracted provider C2C module needs explicit ownership of live startup script reading.
non_blocking_findings.resolution: Folded into the P26 plan before implementation by requiring local safeRead ownership in the provider C2C module.

non_blocking_findings.title: Shared utility placement not mapped
non_blocking_findings.summary: The plan should document which utility helpers remain in the root and which are duplicated into extracted modules.
non_blocking_findings.resolution: Folded into the P26 plan before implementation by adding a utility ownership map.

focus_question_results.question: public_api_preservation
focus_question_results.summary: The plan lists all six public exports and requires import-scan/export parity.

focus_question_results.question: provider_c2c_governance_chain
focus_question_results.summary: The plan moves provider C2C governance as a unit and preserves the runContextWorkPackages/provider executor dispatch chain.

focus_question_results.question: import_cycle_shared_utility_risk
focus_question_results.summary: The plan forbids extracted modules from importing the root and uses local helpers to avoid a utility barrel.

focus_question_results.question: parity_and_gates
focus_question_results.summary: The plan requires import scan, export parity, line counts, deterministic provider C2C output compatibility, focused tests, DeepSeek code review, and final gates.

focus_question_results.question: large_file_bypass_risk
focus_question_results.summary: The plan and existing gate rules prevent passing with root or extracted modules above 500 lines, manifest ceiling increases, or debt growth.
